productDisplayName: Puma Women Body Train White Sports Shoe
description: These cute BodyTrain shoes from puma are inspired by the very feminine Mary Jane style of shoe &ndash but this time with a clearly sporty style. The classic round toe and cross strap have been updated by making a striking diagonal strap which not only looks great but will also hold your foot firmly in place. Soft padding inside gives your foot a comfortable ride, but it's the curved sole which is the star player here. Engineered to tone your legs while you walk, these shoes will activate leg muscles you didn't know you had! Let your feather-light shoes do the work for you. Upper Synthetic leather uppers Velcro fastening to the cross strap for adjustable Fit Black puma cat embroidered on the back of the heel Midsole Eco Ortholite midsole made of environmentally friendly material and offers breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties and long term cushioning Outsole Curved rubber outsole with superior grip using BodyTrain technology for fitness Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
